summary: Completed comprehensive backend and frontend testing for Arabic AI Story/Video Creation App
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 15: load_dotenv loads from /app/.env but KIE_API_KEY is also in backend/.env - could cause confusion
db.ts: window.location.origin works for same-origin but consider using env variable for flexibility
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up automatically during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 14 backend tests pass. Login with password Ahmetlork0009 works. Homepage shows storyboard tools, characters page works. Kie.ai integration tested and working - image upload to CDN returns valid URLs, video task creation returns taskId, task status polling works. All CRUD operations for characters and storyboards verified.

backend_tests_passed: POST /api/characters/save - creates character with id, name, description, visualTraits, images
POST /api/storyboards/save - creates storyboard with id, title, script, style, aspectRatio, scenes
POST /api/kie/upload-image - uploads base64 to kie.ai CDN, returns {url: 'https://tempfile.redpandaai.co/...'}
POST /api/kie/image-to-video - accepts base64 + prompt, returns {taskId, imageUrl}
GET /api/media/list - returns array of media items
frontend_tests_passed: Login page displays with Arabic RTL UI
Wrong password shows error: 'كلمة المرور غير صحيحة'
Home page shows storyboard creation tools
Storyboard creation page shows character selection
Characters page shows empty state when no characters
